syncToast.title: Sync toast notifications
syncToast.desc: Show a toast when an upload or download completes

autoSize.title: Auto-sync size limit
autoSize.desc: Files smaller than this are downloaded automatically

sse.title: Live push (SSE)
sse.desc: The server pushes clipboard changes for instant, battery-friendly sync; falls back to polling when unsupported

remotePolling.title: Remote polling interval
remotePolling.desc: How often to fetch the remote clipboard

localPolling.title: Local polling interval
localPolling.desc: How often to check this device's clipboard for changes

empty.title: No servers configured yet
empty.desc: Tap below to add your first server

space.title: P2P space
space.footer: The device name, passphrase, and invitation code are used only for this operation and are not saved in app settings.

create.title: Create a new space
create.description: Start a new encrypted space on this device

join.title: Join an existing space
join.description: Use an invitation generated on another device

invitation.title: Invite another device
invitation.description: Generate a time-limited invitation for the current space.
invitation.crossNetwork: This invitation can be used by a device on another network.
invitation.sameLocalNetwork: This invitation only works while both devices are on the same local network.

error.operationFailed: The operation failed. Check your input and try again.

error.minOneSecond: Please enter a number of 1 or greater
